title: Collectively
description: Collectively is a simple library needed for older Collective's mods
body:
# Collectively
### A small library for The Collective's mods and plushies
## 📖 Features
**Plushies!**
- The Collective Plushies [ Elysieon and Kognition].
  - Enjoys cake!
  - Both extremely squishy!
  - Goes in backslot!

## 📄 Extras
- _This mod is inspired by doctor4t's [Ratatouille](https://modrinth.com/mod/ratatouille)_
- _If you encounter any issues or have a question DM: @Elysieon_
